prompt: HD pixel art casino scene, 1024x1024. A grid of tiles on a dark table, some revealed showing green gems glowing underneath, some showing red mines/skulls, some still hidden with question marks. A hand hovering over an unrevealed tile with tension. Gold coins piled beside the grid as the running payout. Clean sharp pixel edges, flat color blocks, visible pixel grid. Dark background with cyan and green glow from revealed gems. Casino noir atmosphere.
